TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ray_Blume, title = Ray_Blume, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ray_Blume} }

S.FORM: Ray Blume sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Ray Blume, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ray Blume sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1958, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Ray Blume, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: raj βlume s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, raj βlume, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
